assertions.text: r == r / a * a + r % a

invariants.text: forall k: int {:trigger s[k]} | 0 <= k < i :: minS <= s[k]
forall k: int {:trigger b[k]} | 0 <= k < i :: maxB >= b[k]

assertions.text: shares * (maxB - minS) == shares * maxB - shares * minS
r + shares * (maxB - minS) == r - shares * minS + shares * maxB
r - shares * minS + shares * maxB == r % minS + shares * maxB
profit - r == shares * maxB - shares * minS
shares * maxB - shares * minS == shares * (maxB - minS)

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger s[i]} | 0 <= i < n :: s[i] >= 1
forall j: int {:trigger b[j]} | 0 <= j < m :: b[j] >= 1
forall i: int {:trigger s[i]} | 0 <= i < n :: s[i] >= 1
forall j: int {:trigger b[j]} | 0 <= j < m :: b[j] >= 1

foralls.ensures: forall kk: nat {:trigger Outcome(r, s[ii], b[jj], kk)} {:trigger ValidTrade(r, s[ii], kk)} :: ValidTrade(r, s[ii], kk) ==> Outcome(r, s[ii], b[jj], kk) <= maxBourles

forall jj: int {:trigger b[jj]} | 0 <= jj < |b| :: forall kk: nat {:trigger Outcome(r, s[ii], b[jj], kk)} {:trigger ValidTrade(r, s[ii], kk)} :: ValidTrade(r, s[ii], kk) ==> Outcome(r, s[ii], b[jj], kk) <= maxBourles
forall kk: nat {:trigger Outcome(r, s[ii], b[jj], kk)} {:trigger ValidTrade(r, s[ii], kk)} :: ValidTrade(r, s[ii], kk) ==> Outcome(r, s[ii], b[jj], kk) <= r

forall jj: int {:trigger b[jj]} | 0 <= jj < |b| :: forall kk: nat {:trigger Outcome(r, s[ii], b[jj], kk)} {:trigger ValidTrade(r, s[ii], kk)} :: ValidTrade(r, s[ii], kk) ==> Outcome(r, s[ii], b[jj], kk) <= r
